entry.title: After 100M+ views, this is the system I wish I had when I started

media:group.media:title: After 100M+ views, this is the system I wish I had when I started
media:group.media:description:
Use Eden to take your ideas to the next level: https://eden.so
Since we are launching, there's probably going to be issues. When you sign up, you'll be able to join the Discord (go to your settings and connect), that way we can all chat and solve issues.

entry.title: How To Grow An Audience If You Have 0 Followers (It's Only 2 Habits)

media:group.media:title: How To Grow An Audience If You Have 0 Followers (It's Only 2 Habits)
media:group.media:description:
Eden V2 – find, save, and reverse-engineer viral content: https://eden.so
The youtube swipe file board: https://app.eden.so/w/dan-s-workspace/spaces/28419814-17e3-429d-a918-7ecfbb313150
My weekly writing on the mind, the internet, and the future: https://letters.thedankoe.com
If you'd rather listen to these videos on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/3lZRG3LCFZxKkQVSsCwoyN
––– My Books –––
The Art of Focus: https://theartoffocusbook.com
Purpose & Profit: https://thedankoe.com/purpose
––– Socials –––
Twitter: https://twitter.com/thedankoe Instagram: https://instagram.com/thedankoe YouTube: https://youtube.com/c/DanKoeTalks LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/thedankoe
––– Chapters –––
0:00 Growing on social media is easy 7:57 Do what works, from your own perspective 18:32 The new Eden (and why we had to change) 21:03 You’re going to hate this word, but... networking 28:25 Find someone you WANT to DM 30:18 Send them simple praise 32:32 Show interest in them 33:04 Show you are useful 34:25 Get on a call to make a deeper connection 35:12 Send more resources as they come up 36:08 If you haven’t already, ask
#socialmediagrowth #onepersonbusiness

entry.title: How To Completely Reinvent Yourself In 6-12 Months

media:group.media:title: How To Completely Reinvent Yourself In 6-12 Months
media:group.media:description:
If you don't want to miss my weekly writing, videos, or guides: https://letters.thedankoe.com
If you'd rather listen to these videos on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/3lZRG3LCFZxKkQVSsCwoyN
––– My Books –––
The Art of Focus: https://theartoffocusbook.com
Purpose & Profit: https://thedankoe.com/purpose
––– Socials –––
Twitter: https://twitter.com/thedankoe Instagram: https://instagram.com/thedankoe YouTube: https://youtube.com/c/DanKoeTalks LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/thedankoe
––– Chapters –––
0:00 Lock in, fall off, lock in, repeat 2:32 Your mind is a collection of survival strategies, that’s why it’s so hard to change 17:52 You need a reason with extremely high gravitational pull, and when that one fades, you must find another. 19:54 You need to become brutally aware of who you don’t want to become. 22:54 You need to change your environment faster than the identity can recalibrate. 27:41 You need to increase the gap between impulse and response. 31:39 Winning the game is how you discover it’s the wrong game
#selfimprovement #skillacquisition #learning #identity

entry.title: It doesn’t matter how long it takes

media:group.media:title: It doesn’t matter how long it takes

entry.title: I'm begging you to start writing essays (even if you hate writing)

media:group.media:title: I'm begging you to start writing essays (even if you hate writing)
media:group.media:description:
If you want to learn how i write on the internet: https://stan.store/thedankoe/p/build-a-2hour-content-ecosystem-in-30-days
Eden – do your writing on an infinite canvas for creative work: https://eden.so/dan-yt
If you don't want to miss my weekly writing, videos, or guides: https://letters.thedankoe.com
The One-Person Business Launchpad: https://letters.thedankoe.com/p/full-course-the-one-person-business
If you'd rather listen to these videos on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/3lZRG3LCFZxKkQVSsCwoyN
––– My Books –––
The Art of Focus: https://theartoffocusbook.com
Purpose & Profit: https://thedankoe.com/purpose
––– Socials –––
Twitter: https://twitter.com/thedankoe Instagram: https://instagram.com/thedankoe YouTube: https://youtube.com/c/DanKoeTalks LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/thedankoe
––– Chapters ––– 0:00 I am begging you to write more essays 1:35 The internet isn’t dead, but it’s killing us 6:31 The three forces breaking civilization’s ability to think 10:53 Why essays may be the last bastion of real thinking 16:59 The meaning economy and how to thrive in it 22:05 How to think in public (and why it’s the most valuable skill you can develop)
#essays #creatoreconomy #skillacquisition #learning

entry.title: If you've lost your creative genius, watch this

media:group.media:title: If you've lost your creative genius, watch this
media:group.media:description:
Build 2 hour content system in 14 days (writing challenge starts April 7th, join before then): https://stan.store/thedankoe/p/build-a-2hour-content-ecosystem-in-30-days
Eden – do your creative work on an AI canvas: https://eden.so/dan-yt
If you don't want to miss my writing, videos, or guides: https://letters.thedankoe.com
The One-Person Business Launchpad: https://letters.thedankoe.com/p/full-course-the-one-person-business
If you'd rather listen to these videos on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/3lZRG3LCFZxKkQVSsCwoyN
––– My Books –––
The Art of Focus: https://theartoffocusbook.com
Purpose & Profit: https://thedankoe.com/purpose
––– Socials –––
Twitter: https://twitter.com/thedankoe Instagram: https://instagram.com/thedankoe YouTube: https://youtube.com/c/DanKoeTalks LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/thedankoe
––– Chapters ––– 0:00 I feel brain fried 3:37 You don’t have ideas because there’s too much interference. 5:17 Conditioning is the enemy of wonder. 7:03 Productivity as a priority is a losing game. 9:34 Infinite input and zero processing time. 12:05 The Next Challenge: Build A 2-Hour Content System 13:36 You’re not bored, you’re overstimulated. 14:28 Boredom provides a gateway to novelty. 15:42 The brain will upregulate dopamine receptors when deprived. 16:52 You don’t need motivation, you need clarity. 18:30 Day 1-2: Reduce The Input Fast 20:19 Day 3-4: Digest What’s Already There 23:10 Day 5-6: Become Interested In Life Again 26:12 Day 7: Create With What’s Emerged 29:08 To be creative, you need something to create.
#creativity #creatoreconomy #skillacquisition

entry.title: How To Build A $1M One-Person Business Faster With AI

media:group.media:title: How To Build A $1M One-Person Business Faster With AI

The template + prompts (Eden got a redesign, read the "How to use" document): https://app.eden.so/w/dan-s-workspace/spaces/2f1f8543-4921-417b-a74f-0588fb21aa3a

Join here to read my best work and have it delivered straight to you: https://letters.thedankoe.com

4:33 How To Make $1 Million As One Person, Without The Gimmicks 13:43 How To Build A One-Person Business With AI, The Entire Workflow 16:57 The Personal Brand Strategy Prompt 23:31 How To Start Writing Better-Than-Most Content Immediately 31:06 What To Sell And How To Make It Stand Out
#onepersonbusiness #creatoreconomy #skillacquisition

#onepersonbusiness #artificialintelligence #creatoreconomy

entry.title: If you have multiple interests, do not waste the next 2-3 years

media:group.media:title: If you have multiple interests, do not waste the next 2-3 years
media:group.media:description:
How to actually manage multiple interests and turn them into a one-person business.
Eden – upload your files, transcribe links, have agents do work for you: https://eden.so/dan-yt
Read my letters on similar topics here: https://letters.thedankoe.com
2 Hour Content Ecosystem: https://letters.thedankoe.com/p/how-to-build-a-world-the-2-hour-content
The content map exercise: https://letters.thedankoe.com/p/the-content-map-how-to-never-run
The One-Person Business Launchpad: https://letters.thedankoe.com/p/full-course-the-one-person-business
If you'd rather listen to these videos on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/3lZRG3LCFZxKkQVSsCwoyN

Purpose & Profit: https://thedankoe.com/purpose
––– Socials –––
Twitter: https://twitter.com/thedankoe Instagram: https://instagram.com/thedankoe YouTube: https://youtube.com/c/DanKoeTalks LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/thedankoe
––– Chapters –––
0:00 Having multiple interests is not a weakness 3:55 I – The 3 ingredients of individual success & the death of the expert 11:45 II – You are living through the second renaissance, take advantage of it 16:00 III – How to turn multiple interests into a lucrative way of life 24:19 IV – How to turn yourself into a business 34:05 V – Brand is an environment 38:31 VI – Content is novel perspectives 47:54 VII – Systems are the new product
#onepersonbusiness #selfimprovement #polymath

#onepersonbusiness #selfimprovement #skillacquisition

entry.title: How to fix your entire life in 1 day

media:group.media:title: How to fix your entire life in 1 day
media:group.media:description:
Yes, one day.
Eden – upload your files, transcribe links, have agents do work for you: https://eden.so/dan-yt
Read my letters on similar topics here: https://letters.thedankoe.com
Learn a high-value skill: https://2hourwriter.com
One-Person Business Launchpad: https://letters.thedankoe.com/p/full-course-the-one-person-business
The Human 3.0 Article: https://letters.thedankoe.com/p/human-30-a-map-to-reach-the-top-1
––– My Books –––
The Art of Focus: https://theartoffocusbook.com
Purpose & Profit: https://thedankoe.com/purpose
––– Socials –––
Twitter: https://twitter.com/thedankoe Instagram: https://instagram.com/thedankoe YouTube: https://youtube.com/c/DanKoeTalks LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/thedankoe
Listen To The Koe Cast - the audio version of this video: https://open.spotify.com/show/3lZRG3LCFZxKkQVSsCwoyN?si=012980a5fd694608
––– Chapters –––
0:00 You are going to give up, and that's okay 3:20 I – You aren’t where you want to be because you aren’t the person who would be there 8:28 II – You aren’t where you want to be because you don’t want to be there 11:20 III – You aren’t where you want to be because you’re afraid to be there 17:25 IV – The life you want lies within a specific level of mind 22:22 V – Intelligence is the ability to get what you want out of life 27:03 VI – How to launch into a completely new life (in 1 day) 37:12 VII – Turn Your Life Into A Video Game
#newyears #selfimprovement #psychology
